title: scleroxylum manglillo
intro: Scleroxylum manglillo, also known as the Manglillo tree, is a type of plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Scleroxylum manglillo include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
